steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The explanation must accomplish two things: identify whom the award is named for and name one of its recipients.

steps.title: Find the choice that includes both pieces
steps.content: B covers both: it identifies Alan Turing as the namesake and Judea Pearl as a 2011 recipient. The other choices each omit the namesake information. That matches choice B — B is correct.
